metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_4174
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Liprin-alpha 4 was shown to be enriched at parallel fiber-Purkinje cell synapses in adult mouse cerebellar cortex. Triple-labelling confocal immunofluorescence of liprin-alpha 4, calbindin (Purkinje cell dendritic trees and spines marker), and VGLUT1 (synaptic vesicle marker) . Liprin-alpha 4 did not co-distribute with calbindin but showed partial co-localization with VGLUT1 (Fig. 8). Rabbit polyclonal anti-liprin-alpha antibodies were raised against GST-tag fusion proteins containing the sequence (461-564 of liprin-a4 (EF428334)).

20/01/2021 Dnyanada: Information on antibody specificity:
Figure 1K: Western blots with extracts of HeLa cells transfected with GFP-liprin alpha 4 were blotted against anti-liprinalpha4 antibody. The antibody specifically recognized a band of ~140kD representative of PPFIA4.
Figure 1M: anti-liprinalpha4 antibody preadsorbed with liprin demonstrated no signal (labelled as "block").. Experimental description: Rabbit polyclonal anti-liprin-alpha antibodies were raised against GST-tag fusion proteins containing the sequence (461-564 of liprin-a4 (EF428334)).
